baseline_simple.description: Core constraints only: min lot size, density cap, setbacks.

enriched_row_only.description: Adds only road ROW width constraint.

enriched_operational.description: Adds operational realism constraints: min frontage + road ROW.

enriched_metadata_heavy.description: Adds non-operational constraints (height, lot coverage, overlays) plus standards payload.

enriched_strict.description: Strict operational enrichments to test over-constraint risk.
